privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real AWS CloudWatch and EC2 server time-series metrics provided by the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB). The expected dashboard name ("Outlier Detection"), graph titles ("Most Deviant Metrics", "High Utilization Filter", "Fleet CPU Envelope"), and output file path perfectly match the task description instructions and verifier logic. The assigned occupation (Performance Analyst) and industry (Cloud Infrastructure) correctly reflect the task description context.
